title: Voltas is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Voltas is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
